calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove- Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

G. Ryan Patrick, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff SOMA Grand Homeowners' Association.
Defaulted defendant Gregory Garver appeared.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Witness Marina Trilesskaya sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
1. Judgment is awarded in favor of Plaintiff, SOMA Grand Homeowners' Association against Defendant, Gregory Garver.
2. It is judicially determined that Defendant, Gregory Garver, has violated the legal obligations imposed upon him by the governing documents of the condominium project, and in particular the recorded CC&Rs and Rules of SOMA Grand by harboring prohibited dogs and creating and maintaining a nuisance.
3. A Permanent Prohibitory Injunction is granted restraining and enjoining Defendant, Gregory Garver, from harboring any Presa Canario dog or any other dog specifically prohibited by the SOMA Grand CC&Rs, Section 7.4 at his residence at SOMA Grand condominium complex, 1160 Mission Street, Unit 812, San Francisco, including any of three dogs that were in issue and the subject of the preliminary injunction granted against Defendant, Gregory Garver, on February 1, 2017.
4. As prevailing party on the Complaint, the Plaintiff is entitled to recover prevailing party fees and costs and Defendant Gregory Garver must pay Plaintiff the sum of $29,643.00 in attorneys fees and $1,635.24 costss pursuant to the SOMA Grand CC&Rs, Rules and Regulations and Civil Code section 5975 (c) for a total judgment of $31,278.24.
Judgment signed in open court.
